title: Cardiac Diagnostics I
description: ECG fundamentals: 12-lead acquisition, paper measurements, waveform interpretation, and lead anatomy.

lessons.title: 12-Lead ECG & Rhythm Strip
lessons.description: Objective 1.1.1 — Electrode placement, ECG paper measurements, waveform components (P, QRS, T, U), intervals, segments, and the 12 leads with their anatomic views.

lessons.title: ECG Interpretation: Axis, Ischemia, Hypertrophy & Rhythm
lessons.description: Objective 1.1.2 — Mean QRS axis & axis deviation, ischemia/injury/infarction patterns by wall, chamber enlargement (RAE/LAE/LVH/RVH), electrolyte effects on the ECG, and the 5-step rhythm strip method.

lessons.title: Sinus, Atrial & Junctional Rhythms
lessons.description: Objective 1.1.3 — Recognize sinus rhythms (NSR, brady, tachy, arrhythmia, arrest), atrial rhythms (PAC, MAR/MAT, SVT, WPW, A-flutter, A-fib), and junctional rhythms (PJC, escape, accelerated, tachycardia).

lessons.title: Ventricular Rhythms, AV Blocks & Conduction Defects
lessons.description: Objective 1.1.4 — Recognize ventricular rhythms (PVC, IVR, V-tach incl. torsades, V-fib, asystole), AV blocks (1st, 2nd Type I/II, 2:1, 3rd), bundle branch blocks (RBBB, LBBB), and paced rhythms.

lessons.title: Exercise Stress Testing & Ambulatory Monitoring
lessons.description: Objective 1.1.5 — Perform an exercise stress test (GXT) using Bruce, Modified Bruce, Naughton, or Weber protocols; recognize ECG/non-ECG findings and termination criteria; perform Holter and event monitor application with patient education.

lessons.title: Module Review & Final Exam
lessons.description: Consolidated high-yield review across the 5 lessons paired with a 50-question final exam. Topic coverage aligned with the RESC 2330 flashcard set.

audio.title: Sinus, Atrial, and Junctional Heart Rhythms

resources.title: 12-Lead ECG Placement (video)
resources.description: Step-by-step demonstration of correct limb and chest electrode placement.

resources.title: ECG Interpretation Basics (video)
resources.description: Walkthrough of waveforms, intervals, and segments.

resources.title: 12-Lead ECG Lead Views (video)
resources.description: How each of the 12 leads views the heart in the frontal and horizontal planes.
